mapper.select:
SELECT id, device_no, device_name, entire_no, floor_name, floor_id, building_id, building_name, prison_id, prison_name, power_off, power_config, ip_address, port, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted, parameters, start_time, end_time, position_x, position_y, voltage, electric_current, radio_frequency, ch1, ch2, ch3, ch4, ch5, ch6, ch7, ch8, ch9, ch10, ch11, ch12, ch13, ch14, ch15, ch16, ch17, ch18 FROM t_device
is_deleted = 0
AND ( device_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.name},'%') )

SELECT d.id, d.device_no, d.device_name, d.entire_no, d.floor_name, d.floor_id, d.building_id, d.building_name, d.prison_id, d.prison_name, d.power_off, d.power_config, d.ip_address, d.port, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.is_deleted, d.parameters, d.start_time, d.end_time, d.position_x, d.position_y, d.voltage, d.electric_current, d.radio_frequency, d.ch1, d.ch2, d.ch3, d.ch4, d.ch5, d.ch6, d.ch7, d.ch8, d.ch9, d.ch10, d.ch11, d.ch12, d.ch13, d.ch14, d.ch15, d.ch16, d.ch17, d.ch18, -- 关键字段：是否告警 1=告警中 0=正常 CASE WHEN a.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isAlarm FROM t_device d -- 左关联告警表（只查存在性） LEFT JOIN t_alarm a ON d.id = a.device_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 and a.blocked = 0 and a.processing_status = 0
d.is_deleted = 0
and d.floor_id in
#{id}
and d.id = -1
AND ( d.device_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.name},'%') )
-- 如果一个设备多条告警，只保留一条判断 GROUP BY d.id
mapper.update: update t_device set position_x = #{positionX}, position_y = #{positionY} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, device_no, device_name, entire_no, floor_name, floor_id, building_id, building_name, prison_id, prison_name, power_off, power_config, ip_address, port, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted FROM t_device
is_deleted = 0
and id in
#{id}
and id = -1
